  <input formControlName="title" placeholder="Add a new task..." aria-label="New task title" />
  <button type="submit" [disabled]="taskForm.invalid">Add</button>
</form>

{
  "name": "todo-frontend",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "scripts": {
    "ng": "ng",
    "start": "ng serve",
    "build": "ng build",
    "watch": "ng build --watch --configuration development",
    "test": "ng test"
  },
  "private": true,
  "dependencies": {
    "@angular/animations": "^17.0.0",
    "@angular/common": "^17.0.0",
    "@angular/compiler": "^17.0.0",
    "@angular/core": "^17.0.0",
    "@angular/forms": "^17.0.0",
    "@angular/platform-browser": "^17.0.0",
    "@angular/platform-browser-dynamic": "^17.0.0",
    "@angular/router": "^17.0.0",
    "rxjs": "~7.8.0",
    "tslib": "^2.3.0",
    "zone.js": "~0.14.2"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@angular-devkit/build-angular": "^17.0.0",
    "@angular/cli": "^17.0.0",
    "@angular/compiler-cli": "^17.0.0",
    "@types/jasmine": "~5.1.0",
    "jasmine-core": "~5.1.0",
    "karma": "~6.4.0",

}
tsconfig.json:
{
  "compileOnSave": false,
  "compilerOptions": {
    "baseUrl": "./",
    "outDir": "./dist/out-tsc",
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noImplicitOverride": true,
    "noPropertyAccessFromIndexSignature": true,
    "noImplicitReturns": true,
    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,
    "sourceMap": true,
    "declaration": false,
    "downlevelIteration": true,
    "experimentalDecorators": true,
    "moduleResolution": "node",
    "importHelpers": true,
    "target": "ES2022",
    "module": "ES2022",
    "useDefineForClassFields": false,
    "lib": [
      "ES2022",
      "dom"
    ]
  },
  "angularCompilerOptions": {
    "enableI18nLegacyMessageIdFormat": false,
    "strictInjectionParameters": true,
    "strictInputAccessModifiers": true,
    "strictTemplates": true
  }
}

src/app/shared/mock-data/mock-tickets.ts:
import { Ticket, ActivityNote, TicketStatus, TicketPriority, TicketSeverity, TicketType } from '../models/ticket.model';

export const MOCK_TICKETS: Ticket[] = [
  {
    id: 1,
    title: 'Server is down',
    description: 'The main web server seems to be unresponsive since this morning.',
    priority: TicketPriority.High,
    severity: TicketSeverity.Critical,
    status: TicketStatus.New,
    type: TicketType.Incident,
    created_at: '2023-10-27T10:00:00Z',
    updated_at: '2023-10-27T11:00:00Z',
    creator_id: 2, // Requester
    assignee_id: 1, // Agent
    activity_notes: []
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    title: 'Need access to new software',
    description: 'I need a license and installation for Adobe Photoshop.',
    priority: TicketPriority.Medium,
    severity: TicketSeverity.Medium,
    status: TicketStatus.InProgress,
    type: TicketType.WorkOrder,
    created_at: '2023-10-26T14:30:00Z',
    updated_at: '2023-10-26T15:00:00Z',
    creator_id: 3, // Requester
    assignee_id: 1, // Agent
    activity_notes: []
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    title: 'Deploy new homepage design',
    description: 'Request to deploy the new homepage design that was approved last week.',
    priority: TicketPriority.Medium,
    severity: TicketSeverity.High,
    status: TicketStatus.Submitted,
    type: TicketType.ChangeRequest,
    created_at: '2023-10-25T09:00:00Z',
    updated_at: '2023-10-25T09:00:00Z',
    creator_id: 2, // Requester
    assignee_id: null,
    activity_notes: []
  },
    {
    id: 4,
    title: 'Printer not working on 3rd floor',
    description: 'The main printer on the 3rd floor is not printing. It shows a "Paper Jam" error but there is no paper jam.',
    priority: TicketPriority.Low,
    severity: TicketSeverity.Low,
    status: TicketStatus.Resolved,
    type: TicketType.Incident,
    created_at: '2023-10-24T11:00:00Z',
    updated_at: '2023-10-24T16:00:00Z',
    creator_id: 3, // Requester
    assignee_id: 1, // Agent
    activity_notes: []
  }
];

export const MOCK_ACTIVITY_NOTES: ActivityNote[] = [
    { id: 1, ticket_id: 1, user_id: 2, note: 'Initial report of the server being down.', created_at: '2023-10-27T10:00:00Z' },
    { id: 2, ticket_id: 1, user_id: 1, note: 'Acknowledged. I am looking into the server logs now.', created_at: '2023-10-27T10:05:00Z' },
    { id: 3, ticket_id: 2, user_id: 3, note: 'Please approve this request as soon as possible.', created_at: '2023-10-26T14:30:00Z' },
    { id: 4, ticket_id: 2, user_id: 1, note: 'Procuring license. Will install once available.', created_at: '2023-10-26T15:00:00Z' },
    { id: 5, ticket_id: 4, user_id: 1, note: 'Resolved. The sensor was dusty. Cleaned it and rebooted the printer.', created_at: '2023-10-24T16:00:00Z' }
];
